title: polypodium microcarpum
intro: Polypodium microcarpum, also known as the Chinese leathery fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the body. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Polypodium microcarpum is often prepared as a tea or dried extract, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a range of herbal preparations.
